description: Brand contract for the Olympus tiered-bundle starter-template family.

family_inventory.theme_insertion_point: Load brand-theme.css from frontmatter styles after css/next-core.css on checkout, upsell, downsell, and receipt pages.
family_inventory.pricing_presentation: Tiered checkout cards and bundle upsells support compare/current, savings badge/amount, unit-plus-total, and full-price modes through SDK display nodes.
family_inventory.bundle_picker: Tiered bundle cards with data-next-bundle-selector and data-next-bundle-card anchors.
family_inventory.order_bump: Pre-purchase bump variants use bump-check01.html or bump-switch01.html and data-next-package-toggle anchors.
family_inventory.upsell_downsell: Bundle stepper, tier-pills, and tier-cards upsells require a visible price row above the accept CTA.

exit_pop.behavior: Available include only; strip unless CampaignSpec checkout exit_intent or promo_code_input maps an offer/code.
